mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
)

SELECT '' AS DTA_CHK , X.CO_CD , X.ORDRS_NO , X.ORDRS_SEQ , X.ORDRS_QTY --수주대수 , X.SALES_CD , #{lgistNo} AS LGIST_NO , T.SALES_SEQ , NVL(T.LGIST_QTY, X.ORDRS_QTY) AS LGIST_QTY --물류요청대수 , T.LGIST_REMARK --비고 , CASE WHEN T.SALES_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK_YN , #{clasDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CLAS_DIV , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM TB_CR11M01 A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11D01 B1 ON A1.LGIST_NO = B1.LGIST_NO WHERE A1.CO_CD = X.CO_CD AND A1.ORDRS_NO = X.ORDRS_NO AND A1.CLAS_DIV = #{clasDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B1.SALES_CD = X.SALES_CD ) AS USE_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM TB_CR11M01 A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11D01 B1 ON A1.LGIST_NO = B1.LGIST_NO WHERE A1.CO_CD = X.CO_CD AND A1.ORDRS_NO = X.ORDRS_NO AND A1.CLAS_DIV = #{clasDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B1.SALES_CD = X.SALES_CD ) AS OLD_USE_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM TB_CR11M01 A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11D01 B1 ON A1.LGIST_NO = B1.LGIST_NO WHERE A1.CO_CD = X.CO_CD AND A1.ORDRS_NO = X.ORDRS_NO AND A1.CLAS_DIV = #{clasDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B1.SALES_CD = X.SALES_CD AND A1.LGIST_NO <> #{lgistNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS ANO_USE_YN , Y.ORDRS_CLNT_CD -- 고객사 , A.CLNT_NM AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , Y.CLNT_PJT -- 고객사 PJT , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ORDRS_DTL_DIV20) AS ORDRS_DTL_DIV20_NM -- 신작구분 , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ORDRS_DTL_DIV30) AS ORDRS_DTL_DIV30_NM -- 자체구분 , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.MCTYPE) AS MCTYPE_NM -- 기계구분 , X.PRDT_CD -- 제품구분 , P.PRDT_NM AS PRDT_CD_NM , X.ITEM_DIV -- 아이템구분 , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ITEM_DIV) AS ITEM_DIV_NM , TO_CHAR(X.DUDT_INTEND_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUDT_INTEND_DT --납기예정일 , X.EQP_NM -- 설비명 FROM TB_CR02D02 X INNER JOIN TB_CR02M01 Y ON X.CO_CD = Y.CO_CD AND X.ORDRS_NO = Y.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM01M01 P ON X.PRDT_CD = P.PRDT_CD --제품마스터 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 A ON Y.ORDRS_CLNT_CD = A.CLNT_CD --거래처마스터 LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11D01 T ON T.SALES_CD = X.SALES_CD AND T.LGIST_NO = #{lgistNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE X.SALES_CD IS NOT NULL AND X.CO_CD = #{coCd} AND X.ORDRS_NO = #{ordrsNo} ORDER BY X.ORDRS_SEQ

SELECT T.CO_CD , T.ORDRS_NO , T1.SALES_CD , T.LGIST_NO , T1.SALES_SEQ , 'Y' AS CHK_YN , Y.ORDRS_CLNT_CD , A.CLNT_NM AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , Y.CLNT_PJT , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ORDRS_DTL_DIV20) AS ORDRS_DTL_DIV20_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ORDRS_DTL_DIV30) AS ORDRS_DTL_DIV30_NM , X.PRDT_CD , P.PRDT_NM AS PRDT_CD_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(X.ITEM_DIV) AS ITEM_DIV_NM , TO_CHAR(X.DUDT_INTEND_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUDT_INTEND_DT , X.EQP_NM FROM TB_CR11M01 T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11D01 T1 ON T.LGIST_NO = T1.LGIST_NO INNER JOIN TB_CR02M01 Y ON T.CO_CD = Y.CO_CD AND T.ORDRS_NO = Y.ORDRS_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 A ON Y.ORDRS_CLNT_CD = A.CLNT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR02D02 X ON X.CO_CD = T.CO_CD AND X.ORDRS_NO = T.ORDRS_NO AND X.SALES_CD = T1.SALES_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM01M01 P ON X.PRDT_CD = P.PRDT_CD WHERE T.FILE_TRGT_KEY = #{fileTrgtKey} AND T1.SALES_CD IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.SALES_SEQ

WITH APP_STATUS_LIST AS ( SELECT A.CO_CD, B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, B.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN B.TODO_CF_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = SUM(CASE WHEN A.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'APP9' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN B.TODO_CF_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'APP1' ELSE 'APP0' END AS APP_STATUS FROM TB_BM13M01 A JOIN TB_WB20M03 B ON A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.APP_DIV = B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND A.APP_ID = B.TODO_ID WHERE A.APP_DIV = 'APPDIV03' GROUP BY A.CO_CD, B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, B.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID ) , APP_TODO_LIST AS ( SELECT A.CO_CD, B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, B.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID, A.APP_SEQ, B.TODO_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(B.TODO_ID) AS TODO_ID_NM , DECODE(B.TODO_CF_DT,NULL,'N','Y') AS TODO_CF_YN , X.DEPT_NM , (SELECT LEVEL_NM FROM TB_CM07M01 WHERE LEVEL_CD=X.LEVEL_CD) AS LEVEL_NM FROM TB_BM13M01 A JOIN TB_WB20M03 B ON A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.APP_DIV = B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND A.APP_ID = B.TODO_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT BB.ID , BB.NAME , BB.LEVEL_CD , BB.EMAIL , BB.TEL_NO , BB.OFF_TEL_NO , BB.FAX_NO , CC.DEPT_NM FROM TB_CM06M01 BB INNER JOIN TB_CM04M01 CC ON(BB.DEPT_ID=CC.DEPT_ID) ) X ON(B.TODO_ID=X.ID) WHERE A.APP_DIV = 'APPDIV03' ) SELECT FILE_TRGT_KEY , T.CO_CD , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.CO_CD) CO_NM , T.LGIST_NO , T.ORDRS_NO , (SELECT A.CLNT_NM FROM TB_CR02M01 Y LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BM02M01 A ON Y.ORDRS_CLNT_CD = A.CLNT_CD WHERE T.CO_CD = Y.CO_CD AND T.ORDRS_NO = Y.ORDRS_NO ) AS ORDRS_CLNT_NM , T.CLNT_PJT , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.CLNT_PJT) AS CLNT_PJT_NM , T.PBLICTE_DT , T.REQ_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(T.REQ_ID) AS REQ_ID_NM , T.PART_NO , T.REQ_FX_DT , T.CLAS_DIV , T.TRNS_DIV , T.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , T.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV , T.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , T.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV , T.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV , T.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV , T.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC , T.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV , T.STA_PLACE , T.STA_ADDR , T.STA_CHRG_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(T.STA_CHRG_ID) AS STA_CHRG_ID_NM , (SELECT TEL_NO FROM TB_CM06M01 WHERE ID = T.STA_CHRG_ID) AS STA_CHRG_ID_TEL_NO , T.ARVL_PLACE , T.ARVL_ADDR , T.ARVL_CHRG_CONT , T.PRDLST_CONT , T.PRD_AMT , T.WIDTH_SIZE , T.VRTICL_SIZE , T.HEIGHT_SIZE , T.FRMLC_BEFORE_WT , T.FRMLC_AFTER_WT , T.SHIPMNT_DT , T.HOPE_ARVL_DT , T.LGIST_RMK , T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , T.LGIST_COMPL_YN , TO_CHAR(T.LGIST_COMPL_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LGIST_COMPL_DTTM , T.LGIST_COMPL_ID , FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(T.LGIST_COMPL_ID) AS LGIST_COMPL_ID_NM , T.LGIST_COMPL_RMK , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.CLAS_DIV) AS CLAS_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.TRNS_DIV) AS TRNS_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV) AS DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV) AS DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV) AS DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV) AS OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV) AS OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(T.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV) AS OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN T.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN T.DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV ELSE T.OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV END) AS TRNS_AREA_DIV_NM , CASE WHEN INSTR(T.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV,'99') = 13 THEN DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC WHEN INSTR(T.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV,'99') = 13 THEN OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC ELSE FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN T.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN T.DMS_SEND_CND_DIV ELSE T.OVS_SEND_CND_DIV END) END AS SEND_CND_DIV_NM , FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CASE WHEN T.TRNS_DIV = 'LGISTDIV0301' THEN T.DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV ELSE T.OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV END) AS PACK_KIND_DIV_NM , T.ETC_FIELD1 , T.ETC_FIELD2 , T.ETC_FIELD3 , T.CREAT_ID , TO_CHAR(T.CREAT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CREAT_DTTM , T.UDT_ID , TO_CHAR(T.UDT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') UDT_DTTM --,CASE WHEN T.FILE_TRGT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN NVL(AP.APP_STATUS, 'APP0') END AS APP_STATUS , (SELECT CASE WHEN ( COUNT(A.TODO_KEY) = SUM(DECODE(NVL(A.SANCTN_STTUS, 'N'), 'N', 0, 'Y', 1) ) ) THEN 'Y' ELSE TO_CHAR( SUM(DECODE(NVL(A.SANCTN_STTUS, 'N'), 'N', 0, 'Y', 1) ) ) END TODO_YN FROM TB_WB20M03 A WHERE A.TODO_NO = T.LGIST_NO) AS APP_STATUS , T.STA_CHRG_CONT , REQ_NO FROM TB_CR11M01 T --LEFT OUTER JOIN APP_STATUS_LIST AP ON T.CO_CD = AP.CO_CD AND T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = AP.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = AP.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID WHERE FILE_TRGT_KEY = #{fileTrgtKey}

SELECT TRNS_DIV, DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, ARVL_PLACE, ARVL_ADDR, ARVL_CHRG_CONT FROM ( SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 1 AS PRI, TRNS_DIV, DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, ARVL_PLACE, ARVL_ADDR, ARVL_CHRG_CONT FROM TB_QM01D04 WHERE REQ_NO = #{reqNo} AND TRNS_DIV IS NOT NULL UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS PRI, TRNS_DIV, DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, ARVL_PLACE, ARVL_ADDR, ARVL_CHRG_CONT FROM TB_CR02D04 WHERE CO_CD = #{coCd} AND ORDRS_NO = #{ordrsNo} AND TRNS_DIV IS NOT NULL UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS PRI, TRNS_DIV, DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, ARVL_PLACE, ARVL_ADDR, ARVL_CHRG_CONT FROM TB_BM02D04 WHERE CLNT_CD = #{clntCd} AND TRNS_DIV IS NOT NULL UNION ALL
-- 아무 조건도 없거나, 조건은 있으나 데이터가 없을 때 NULL 1행 보장 UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS PRI, NULL AS TRNS_DIV, NULL AS DMS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, NULL AS DMS_SEND_CND_DIV, NULL AS DMS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, NULL AS DMS_PACK_KIND_DIV, NULL AS OVS_TRNS_AREA_DIV, NULL AS OVS_SEND_CND_DIV, NULL AS OVS_SEND_CND_DIV_ETC, NULL AS OVS_PACK_KIND_DIV, NULL AS ARVL_PLACE, NULL AS ARVL_ADDR, NULL AS ARVL_CHRG_CONT FROM DUAL ) ORDER BY PRI ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.LGIST_NO, A.LGIST_NO_SEQ, A.LGIST_ITEM_NO, A.LGIST_ITEM_CODE, A.LGIST_ITEM_NM, A.LGIST_ITEM_DIV, A.LGIST_ITEM_QTY, A.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM, A.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME, CASE WHEN A.LGIST_ITEM_IMG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS HAS_IMG FROM TB_CR11D02 A WHERE LGIST_NO = #{lgistNo} ORDER BY LGIST_NO_SEQ

SELECT LGIST_ITEM_IMG as lgistItemImg, LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME as lgistItemImgMime, LGIST_NO as lgistNo, LGIST_NO_SEQ as lgistNoSeq FROM TB_CR11D02 WHERE LGIST_NO = #{lgistNo} AND LGIST_NO_SEQ = #{lgistNoSeq}

SELECT A.APP_SEQ, B.TODO_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(B.TODO_ID) AS TODO_ID_NM , DECODE(B.TODO_CF_DT,NULL,'N','Y') AS TODO_CF_YN , X.DEPT_NM , (SELECT LEVEL_NM FROM TB_CM07M01 WHERE LEVEL_CD=X.LEVEL_CD) AS LEVEL_NM FROM TB_BM13M01 A JOIN TB_WB20M03 B ON A.CO_CD = B.CO_CD AND A.APP_DIV = B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND A.APP_ID = B.TODO_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT BB.ID , BB.NAME , BB.LEVEL_CD , BB.EMAIL , BB.TEL_NO , BB.OFF_TEL_NO , BB.FAX_NO , CC.DEPT_NM FROM TB_CM06M01 BB INNER JOIN TB_CM04M01 CC ON(BB.DEPT_ID=CC.DEPT_ID) ) X ON(B.TODO_ID=X.ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CR11M01 T ON B.CO_CD = T.CO_CD AND B.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID AND B.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = T.TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID WHERE T.FILE_TRGT_KEY = #{fileTrgtKey} ORDER BY APP_SEQ
SELECT 'LGT'||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YY')||'-'||TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(NVL(FILE_TRGT_KEY,'0'))),0) + 1,'00000')) FROM TB_CR11M01

SELECT CO_CD , A.APP_DIV AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID , A.APP_DIV||TRIM(TO_CHAR(#{fileTrgtKey},'00000')) AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID , APP_ID AS TODO_ID , '' AS PG_PATH , '' AS PG_PARAM , '' AS SALES_CD , '' AS WBS_PLANCO_CD , '' AS WBS_PLAN_NO , '' AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_KIND , '' AS WBS_PLAN_CODE_ID , '' AS WBS_RSLTS_FILE_TRGT_KEY , '' AS WBS_RSLTS_CO_CD , '' AS WBS_RSLTS_PLAN_NO , '' AS WBS_RSLTS_PLAN_CODE_KIND , '' AS WBS_RSLTS_PLAN_CODE_ID FROM TB_BM13M01 A WHERE CO_CD = #{coCd} AND APP_DIV = #{appDiv} ORDER BY APP_SEQ
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO TB_CR11D02 T USING ( SELECT #{lgistNo} AS LGIST_NO, #{lgistNoSeq} AS LGIST_NO_SEQ, #{lgistItemNo} AS LGIST_ITEM_NO, #{lgistItemCode} AS LGIST_ITEM_CODE, #{lgistItemNm} AS LGIST_ITEM_NM, #{lgistItemDiv} AS LGIST_ITEM_DIV, #{lgistItemQty} AS LGIST_ITEM_QTY, #{lgistItemImg, jdbcType=BLOB} AS LGIST_ITEM_IMG, #{lgistItemImgNm} AS LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM, #{lgistItemImgMime} AS LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME, #{userId} AS CREAT_ID, #{pgmId} AS CREAT_PGM FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.LGIST_NO = S.LGIST_NO AND T.LGIST_NO_SEQ = S.LGIST_NO_SEQ)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.LGIST_ITEM_NO = S.LGIST_ITEM_NO, T.LGIST_ITEM_CODE = S.LGIST_ITEM_CODE, T.LGIST_ITEM_NM = S.LGIST_ITEM_NM, T.LGIST_ITEM_DIV = S.LGIST_ITEM_DIV, T.LGIST_ITEM_QTY = S.LGIST_ITEM_QTY, T.UDT_ID = S.CREAT_ID, T.UDT_DTTM = SYSTIMESTAMP, T.UDT_PGM = S.CREAT_PGM , T.LGIST_ITEM_IMG = S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG , T.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM = S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM , T.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME = S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( LGIST_NO, LGIST_NO_SEQ, LGIST_ITEM_NO, LGIST_ITEM_CODE, LGIST_ITEM_NM, LGIST_ITEM_DIV, LGIST_ITEM_QTY, LGIST_ITEM_IMG, LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM, LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, CREAT_PGM ) VALUES ( S.LGIST_NO, S.LGIST_NO_SEQ, S.LGIST_ITEM_NO, S.LGIST_ITEM_CODE, S.LGIST_ITEM_NM, S.LGIST_ITEM_DIV, S.LGIST_ITEM_QTY, S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG, S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_NM, S.LGIST_ITEM_IMG_MIME, S.CREAT_ID, SYSTIMESTAMP, S.CREAT_PGM )
mapper.select: SELECT A.LGIST_NO AS LGIST_NO, A.LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ AS LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ, A.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO AS LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO, A.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM AS LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM, A.LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT AS LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT, A.LGIST_PART_MAKER AS LGIST_PART_MAKER, A.LGIST_PART_QTY AS LGIST_PART_QTY, A.LGIST_PART_PRICE AS LGIST_PART_PRICE, A.LGIST_PART_AMOUNT AS LGIST_PART_AMOUNT, A.LGIST_PART_WEIGHT AS LGIST_PART_WEIGHT, A.LGIST_PART_IMG_NM AS LGIST_PART_IMG_NM, A.LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME AS LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME, CASE WHEN A.LGIST_PART_IMG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS HAS_IMG FROM TB_CR11D03 A WHERE LGIST_NO = #{lgistNo} ORDER BY LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO TB_CR11D03 T USING ( SELECT #{lgistNo} AS LGIST_NO, #{lgistPartNoSeq} AS LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ, #{lgistPartItemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO, #{lgistPartItemNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM, #{lgistPartSpecMat, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT, #{lgistPartMaker, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_MAKER, #{lgistPartQty, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS LGIST_PART_QTY, #{lgistPartPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS LGIST_PART_PRICE, #{lgistPartAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS LGIST_PART_AMOUNT, #{lgistPartWeight, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_WEIGHT, #{lgistPartImg, jdbcType=BLOB} AS LGIST_PART_IMG, #{lgistPartImgNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_IMG_NM, #{lgistPartImgMime, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CREAT_ID, #{pgmId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CREAT_PGM FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.LGIST_NO = S.LGIST_NO AND T.LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ = S.LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO = S.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO, T.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM = S.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM, T.LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT = S.LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT, T.LGIST_PART_MAKER = S.LGIST_PART_MAKER, T.LGIST_PART_QTY = S.LGIST_PART_QTY, T.LGIST_PART_PRICE = S.LGIST_PART_PRICE, T.LGIST_PART_AMOUNT = S.LGIST_PART_AMOUNT, T.LGIST_PART_WEIGHT = S.LGIST_PART_WEIGHT, T.UDT_ID = S.CREAT_ID, T.UDT_DTTM = SYSTIMESTAMP, T.UDT_PGM = S.CREAT_PGM , T.LGIST_PART_IMG = S.LGIST_PART_IMG , T.LGIST_PART_IMG_NM = S.LGIST_PART_IMG_NM , T.LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME = S.LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( LGIST_NO, LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ, LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO, LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM, LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT, LGIST_PART_MAKER, LGIST_PART_QTY, LGIST_PART_PRICE, LGIST_PART_AMOUNT, LGIST_PART_WEIGHT, LGIST_PART_IMG, LGIST_PART_IMG_NM, LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, CREAT_PGM ) VALUES ( S.LGIST_NO, S.LGIST_PART_NO_SEQ, S.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NO, S.LGIST_PART_ITEM_NM, S.LGIST_PART_SPEC_MAT, S.LGIST_PART_MAKER, S.LGIST_PART_QTY, S.LGIST_PART_PRICE, S.LGIST_PART_AMOUNT, S.LGIST_PART_WEIGHT, S.LGIST_PART_IMG, S.LGIST_PART_IMG_NM, S.LGIST_PART_IMG_MIME, S.CREAT_ID, SYSTIMESTAMP, S.CREAT_PGM )

UPDATE TB_CR11M01 SET LGIST_COMPL_YN = #{lgistComplYn}, LGIST_COMPL_DTTM = CASE WHEN #{lgistComplYn} = 'Y' THEN SYSDATE ELSE NULL END, LGIST_COMPL_ID = CASE WHEN #{lgistComplYn} = 'Y' THEN #{userId} ELSE NULL END, LGIST_COMPL_RMK = CASE WHEN #{lgistComplYn} = 'Y' THEN #{lgistComplRmk, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ELSE NULL END, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId} WHERE LGIST_NO = #{lgistNo}
